articles.title: Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms
articles.description: The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) issued an alert about a global exploitation campaign targeting vulnerable content management systems (CMS) and plugins. [...]

articles.title: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets
articles.description: A PNG hiding a prompt injection could steal your repo's secrets, researchers demonstrate. The technique, dubbed 'Ghostcommit,' slipped past AI code reviewers CodeRabbit and Bugbot, which never open image files at all, then convinced a coding agent to read a repo's .env and write every secret into the code as a list of numbers. [...]

articles.title: New U-Boot flaws could enable stealthy firmware attacks
articles.description: Six vulnerabilities in the widely used U-Boot bootloader have been discovered that could allow attackers to execute malicious code during device boot, potentially enabling stealthy firmware attacks that compromise security protections and install persistent malware. [...]

articles.title: Ryuk ransomware member pleads guilty in the US, faces 15 years in prison
articles.description: A 34-year-old Armenian man has pleaded guilty to hacking U.S. companies and deploying the infamous Ryuk ransomware to encrypt their systems. [...]

articles.title: Police suspects Dutch hackers were involved in Odido breach

articles.title: Progress urges ShareFile admins to shut down servers over “credible” threat

articles.title: Hackers exploit critical auth bypass in Gitea Docker image

articles.title: Money launderer accused of stealing seized crypto while in prison

articles.title: The Replicant in Your Directory: AI Agents and the Identity Security Gap
articles.description: AI agents are accelerating the growth of non-human identities, making it harder for organizations to understand what exists, who owns it, and what it can access. Netwrix explains why stronger visibility and identity governance are essential as AI expands the enterprise attack surface. [...]

articles.title: OpenMandriva Linux says contributor tried to sabotage the project
